name: Old Time Vanilla Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: Water for each can of milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks and sugar together until well combined.
2. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and evaporated milk to the egg yolk mixture. Mix in 1 cup of water for each can of evaporated milk used.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Whisk the egg whites until they form stiff peaks. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the milk mixture, being careful not to deflate them.
5. Pour the mixture into a freezer-safe container and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions for your specific ice cream maker or gallon ice cream freezer.
6. Once frozen, churn the ice cream in the freezer until it reaches a creamy consistency.
Yield: 1 gallon
